title: Southern Regional Load Dispatch Center
bullets: Designed and benchmarked production-grade time-series forecasting models (NNs, gradient-boosted trees, ensembles) for next-day grid demand prediction, achieving 92% accuracy and outperforming vendor forecasts.
Engineered temporal and weather-derived features (lag structures, rolling statistics) to improve robustness and predictive performance.
Built and deployed a Linux-based inference pipeline consuming minute-level PostgreSQL data, automated via cron to generate rolling forecasts every 15 minutes.
Integrated forecasts and evaluation metrics into Grafana dashboards for real-time monitoring.
